name: Poolside Lip Gloss Application
description: Influencer aesthetic poolside portrait applying lip gloss, bikini on lounge chair with detailed accessories
input_prompt: woman applying lip gloss on pool lounge chair influencer style

subject.description: young woman 20-25 with golden tan sun-kissed skin, honey blonde hair in two braids with lighter highlights and darker roots

realism_markers: natural sunlight highlights on shoulders and face

hair.color: honey blonde with lighter highlights, darker roots
hair.style: long hair plaited into two braids, loose strands framing face
hair.details: accessory: black hair ties visible on braids

face.expression: relaxed, slightly playful, mouth open mid-application
face.details: eyes: hidden behind sunglasses, well-groomed arched light brown eyebrows; nose: small button nose, soft bridge; cheeks: full, high cheekbones, subtle bronzer, glowing highlight; lips: full plump, slightly parted, high-gloss wet look, sheer pink/fuchsia gloss

accessories: rectangular rimless designer sunglasses with gradient tint
silver stud earrings with crystal details
silver chain bracelet on left wrist
design: abstract pink and white nail art

pose_action.position: lying on stomach on lounge chair, propped up on elbows
pose_action.camera_relation: medium shot, eye level, upper body and partial lower back
pose_action.dynamic_elements: action: applying lip gloss, left_hand: holding pink lip gloss wand applicator near lips, right_hand: holding pink lip gloss tube/bottle, head: looking back over left shoulder toward camera

props.details: pink tube and wand with bright bubblegum pink liquid

flattened_prompt: high-definition influencer aesthetic portrait, young woman 20-25 golden tan sun-kissed skin dewy finish, honey blonde hair in two braids loose strands framing face, relaxed playful expression mouth open, rimless gradient sunglasses silver crystal earrings bracelet ring, chocolate brown bikini, almond nails pink white abstract art, lying on stomach on grey lounge chair propped on elbows, applying lip gloss left hand holding wand right hand holding pink tube, looking back over left shoulder, poolside patio grey pergola overhead green foliage blurred, bright daylight dappled shadows, 85mm portrait lens sharp focus on face, 4:5 vertical portrait
negative_prompt_flat: studio lighting, harsh shadows, flat lighting, overexposed, cartoon, 3d render, anime, blurry, low quality

subject.description: Young woman 20-25 with golden tan sun-kissed skin, dewy finish

face.expression: Relaxed, playful, mouth open mid lip gloss application
face.cheeks: Full, high cheekbones, subtle bronzer, glowing highlight
face.lips: Full plump, slightly parted, high-gloss wet sheer pink/fuchsia

Silver stud earrings with crystal details

pose_action.action: Applying lip gloss - left hand holding wand near lips, right hand holding tube

midjourney.prompt: influencer poolside portrait, young woman tan skin blonde braids, applying pink lip gloss, gradient sunglasses silver jewelry, chocolate bikini, lying on lounge chair looking over shoulder, grey pergola dappled shadows green foliage, bright daylight, sharp focus --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic influencer aesthetic

ideogram.prompt: Young woman with golden tan skin and blonde braids applying lip gloss while lying on poolside lounge chair, wearing chocolate brown bikini and designer sunglasses, looking back over shoulder, grey pergola creating dappled shadows, green foliage in background

recraft.prompt: Influencer poolside portrait, tan woman blonde braids applying lip gloss, chocolate bikini sunglasses, lounge chair, pergola shadows, bright daylight

luma.prompt: Poolside scene, woman on lounge chair slowly applies lip gloss while looking back, sunlight filters through pergola slats creating shifting shadows, relaxed luxury atmosphere
luma.motion_notes: Slow lip gloss application movement, gentle shadow shift from pergola, subtle breathing

reve.prompt: Influencer lifestyle photography in the style of high-end beauty content, young woman applying lip gloss poolside, golden tan skin blonde braids, designer accessories, dappled pergola light

grok-imagine.prompt: Influencer style poolside photo, tan woman with blonde braids applying pink lip gloss on lounge chair, chocolate bikini gradient sunglasses, looking over shoulder, pergola shadows, bright sunny day

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman in her early twenties with sun-kissed golden tan skin lies on her stomach on a grey outdoor lounge chair at a poolside patio. She has honey blonde hair styled in two long braids with loose strands framing her face, and darker roots showing naturally. She wears a flattering chocolate brown bikini and rectangular rimless gradient sunglasses. Her expression is relaxed and playful as she applies pink lip gloss, holding the wand near her full, glossy lips with her left hand while her right hand holds the pink tube. She looks back over her left shoulder toward the camera. Her nails are almond-shaped with abstract pink and white nail art. Silver jewelry includes crystal stud earrings, a chain bracelet, and a ring. Above her, a grey slat pergola creates dappled shadows on her skin, with green foliage blurred softly in the background. Bright natural daylight illuminates the scene with warm, flattering highlights on her shoulders and face. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture with visible pores.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman with golden tan skin and honey blonde braids applying lip gloss while lying on poolside lounge chair, chocolate brown bikini, rimless gradient sunglasses, silver jewelry, looking over shoulder at camera, grey pergola overhead creating dappled shadows, green foliage background, bright natural daylight, 85mm portrait photography with shallow depth of field, influencer lifestyle aesthetic, not airbrushed or cartoon-like
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A sun-kissed young woman with honey blonde braided hair applies pink lip gloss while lounging poolside. She wears a chocolate brown bikini and rimless gradient sunglasses, with silver jewelry catching the light. Lying on her stomach on a grey lounge chair, she looks back over her shoulder with a playful expression. Dappled shadows from a grey pergola pattern her golden tan skin as bright daylight filters through. Green foliage softens the background. Professional portrait photography with sharp focus on her face and glossy lips.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bikini color to navy blue while keeping the same pose, expression, and poolside setting. Preserve the dappled pergola shadows and honey blonde braids.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed accessories, nail art, lip product color, hair accessory
2_realism_anchors: 'glossy wet lip texture', 'dappled pergola shadows', 'sunlight highlights'
4_negative_hygiene: excludes studio lighting, harsh shadows, flat look
5_spatial_consistency: precise pose with hand positions for lip gloss action
7_action_capture: mid-application moment adds dynamism and authenticity
